key.title: Key
key.description: Stable template identifier, used to create evaluators from the template.

direct_use.title: Direct Use
direct_use.description: Whether the template can be used without further configuration.

settings_presets.title: Settings Presets
settings_presets.description: Preset parameter configurations shipped with the template.

settings_template.title: Settings Template
settings_template.description: JSON Schema describing the template's configurable parameters.

outputs_schema.title: Outputs Schema
outputs_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the template's evaluator output shape.

oss.title: Oss
oss.description: True when the template is available in OSS builds.

requires_llm_api_keys.title: Requires Llm Api Keys
requires_llm_api_keys.description: True when the template calls an LLM provider and requires an API key.

archived.title: Archived
archived.description: True when the template is deprecated. Hidden unless `include_archived=true`.

items.title: EvaluatorTemplate
items.description:
Static evaluator template definition (built-in evaluator types).

Templates are shipped with the product and describe the available
evaluator types. They are read-only and separate from user-owned
evaluator artifacts.

schema.title: EvaluatorTemplatesResponse
schema.description: Envelope for a list of evaluator templates.
